name: x-snc-split-seismic
description: Seismic web component (Pattern B) that hosts the Lit SplitApp inside a Now Experience workspace

scripts.build:local: SN_INSTANCE=http://localhost:8080 SN_USERNAME=admin SN_PASSWORD=admin snc ui-component build
scripts.deploy:local: SN_INSTANCE=http://localhost:8080 SN_USERNAME=admin SN_PASSWORD=admin snc ui-component deploy
